title: About — Anybuild
description: Anybuild is a model-driven platform by Onedb, shaped by years of ERP and CRM delivery in real business environments.

hero.copyHtml:
Anybuild is a model-driven platform for building business systems.
It is developed by Onedb, a company focused on ERP and CRM systems in real environments.

sections.title: Where it comes from
paragraphs: The founders worked with ERP and CRM systems for years before Onedb. They saw recurring issues: complexity, high cost, difficult integrations, and rigid structures.
Onedb was formed in 2017 to address these problems. The initial goal was to build a better ERP and CRM system that could adapt to real business needs.
As the work progressed, it became clear that the underlying problem was not just the applications, but the system layer itself.
This led to the evolution of Anybuild - a platform not tied to a specific business application that defines how systems are built and run.
The rise of AI fits naturally into this approach. It accelerates system definition and reduces the learning curve, while the platform keeps structure, rules, and consistency in place.

sections.title: What exists today
paragraphs: The platform and applications are built together and evolve together.

Anybuild
Model-driven platform that defines how systems are built and run.

Onedb Smartsuite
ERP and CRM systems built in parallel and running on top of the platform in production.
The platform and applications were developed together. The platform defines the system. Onedb Smartsuite uses it in practice.

sections.title: How it is different
paragraphs: Traditional systems are built per project. Each implementation starts again, even when the structure is similar.
Anybuild focuses on the system itself. A model defines how things work, and that model is extended over time.
The result is not a project deliverable. It is a system that continues to evolve.

sections.title: What it enables
paragraphs: Business systems can be built quickly from scratch. They can also be reused, adapted, and extended without rebuilding everything.
Each client runs their own system instance. Systems can be cloned, adjusted, and distributed where needed.
The platform includes the system layer. Hosting, database, workflows, reporting, and security are already part of it.

sections.title: Locations
paragraphs: Engineering teams are based in Lisbon and Belgrade.
Sales, consulting, and operations are based in London, Jersey, and Lisbon.
Systems are deployed on major cloud providers, with region-based hosting. This allows customers to choose where their data is located.

sectionCta.title: See how Anybuild works
sectionCta.copyHtml: From system model to running business software, everything is designed to evolve over time.
